subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Dost thou find within thyself such strength as would enable thee to arise in this Cause whereby feet have slipped [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی هل تجد فی نفسک من قوه لتقوم بها علی هذا الامر الذی به زلت الاقدام و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
